name: Acarix AB (publ)
summary: Acarix AB (publ), a medical technology company, develops and commercializes diagnostic tests for cardiovascular diseases. The company offers CADScor System for the diagnosis of coronary artery disease. It operates in Germany, Sweden, Denmark, and internationally. Acarix AB (publ) was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
